name: Miso Topping for Grilled Vegetables and Fish
recipeIngredient: ground toasted sesame seeds -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine the misos, egg yolks, sake, mirin, and sugar. Whisk until fully combined.
2. Place over simmering water and gradually stir in the dashi (or diluted chicken stock). Stir continuously until thickened.
3. Add any optional seasonings as desired. Allow mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Store covered in refrigerator for up to 2 weeks. Bring back to room temperature before using.
